EV6 Owner Notes

The EV6 is assigned to the compact electric crossover fleet. These notes cover
charging habits, winter range observations, and driver reminders collected from
ordinary use.

For long trips, the EV6 should start with at least 80 percent battery when the
route includes highway driving and cold weather. Drivers reported that cabin
preconditioning before departure improved comfort without a large range penalty.

Fast charging works best when the battery is warm. The owner notes recommend
planning a short warm-up drive before using a high-power DC charger in winter.

The tire-pressure reminder is unrelated to warranty coverage. It appears here
because several EV6 drivers confused the maintenance alert with a battery issue.
